name: Stone Golem of Thornfield
description: The rubble shifts and groans as a figure of mortared stone rises from the ruins, moss-bearded and ancient. Its hollow eyes flare with pale light, and it hefts a fist the size of an anvil. The builders of Thornfield set this guardian well.
failureConsequence: The golem's stone fist catches you square and sends you tumbling through the archway. You wake among the brambles outside the ruins, barred from entry.
